properties.name: mpesa.consumer.key
properties.description: Safaricom Daraja consumer key from the developer portal.

properties.name: mpesa.consumer.secret
properties.description: Safaricom Daraja consumer secret from the developer portal.

properties.name: mpesa.shortcode
properties.description: M-Pesa STK push business shortcode (e.g. 174379 for sandbox).

properties.name: mpesa.passkey
properties.description: M-Pesa Lipa Na M-Pesa passkey for STK push.

properties.name: mpesa.public.url
properties.description: Publicly reachable base URL for callbacks (ngrok / Cloudflare tunnel).

properties.name: mpesa.callback.url
properties.description: Full callback URL sent to Safaricom for STK push responses.
